author: gb9t
content: Iteration 20: scsi/aacraid.md committed (b94c825, 206 lines). Adaptec/Microsemi/Microchip AAC-RAID — third major enterprise RAID HBA family. RX/RKT/SA/NARK legacy + SrcV2 modern SmartRAID 8000/9000 silicon. ~13600 LOC. Rust translation: typed FIB, AacSilicon trait per-variant, /dev/aac chardev typed ioctls, Lun<Logical | JBOD> typed dispatch. Grsec: /dev/aac chardev historical CVE source (CVE-2017-9059 OOB + CVE-2013-2899 permission) — defenses CAP_SYS_RAWIO + FIB opcode allowlist + per-opcode size + destructive-op CAP_SYS_ADMIN + FW signature + AIF rate-limit + per-silicon detection cross-check + battery-state info-leak gate. Session totals: 20 docs / ~1.42M upstream LOC. Storage tier complete (SAS + FC×2 + RAID): mpt3sas + qla2xxx + lpfc + aacraid. Next iteration: drivers/scsi/megaraid/ — LSI MegaRAID (fourth major RAID HBA family — closes the enterprise storage controller coverage).
